name: io.github.christerso/civnode
description: CivNode — a slow web social platform. Read random monuments, browse creative writing, explore forums, send anonymous letters, and manage patron subscriptions.

environmentVariables.name: CIVNODE_SESSION_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Session token for authenticated operations (login to get one). Public tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: CIVNODE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base API URL. Defaults to https://civnode.com
